bibliography.bibliomixed:
FKulig JC, Fan H (2013) Understanding death and dying among the low-German-speaking Mennonites.
https://www.researchgate.net/publication/271954003_Understanding_Death_and_Dying_Among_the_Low-German-Speaking_Mennonites
Jain A, Al Khalili Y (2023) Congenital myotonic dystrophy. In: Stat Pearls [internet]. Stat Pearls Publishing, Treasure Island, FL

Lehmann-Willenbrock N, Allen JA, Meinecke AL (2013) Observing culture: differences in U. S.-American and German team meeting behaviors. Psychology faculty.
http://digitalcommons.unomaha.edu/cgi/viewcontent.cgi? article=1102&context=psychfacpub
Steckler J (2013) People of German heritage. In: Purnell L (ed) Transcultural health care: a culturally competent approach, 4th edn. F. A. Davis Company, Philadelphia
